extensionDescription.message: Автозаполнение полей Chrome Web Store, локализованных описаний, скриншотов и форм конфиденциальности из локальных файлов.

optionsSubtitle.message: Импортируйте плоские файлы локализованных описаний и используйте их в панелях магазинов расширений.

themeHint.message: Choose brightness and visual style separately.

importHintFlexible.message: Выберите корень проекта, папку store-listing или папку с описаниями.

importHintLocaleFiles.message: StorePilot ищет файлы описаний с именами локалей, например

importHintDrag.message: Также можно перетащить файлы описаний прямо на эту панель.

privacyDocReferenceIntro.message: StorePilot может сканировать один проектный документ на наличие полей конфиденциальности Chrome Web Store. Используйте эти канонические ключи, чтобы сканер мог маршрутизировать текст, не угадывая его.

privacyDocPermissionRule.message: Для обоснования разрешений используйте permission.<manifest permission code>. Суффикс должен соответствовать коду в разрешениях вашего манифеста: optional_permissions, host_permissions или content_scripts.matches.

privacyDocNamingGuideline.message: Рекомендуемые имена файлов: docs/chrome-web-store-privacy-form.md или STORE_JUSTIFICATIONS.md. StorePilot также принимает другие файлы.md или.txt, если содержимое содержит блок [privacy], канонические ключи или узнаваемые заголовки выравнивания хранилища.

privacyDocFutureProof.message: Если разрешение здесь не указано, все равно используйте тот же шаблон, например permission.bookmarks или permission.system.display. StorePilot должен рассматривать сам код манифеста как источник истины.

projectReferenceIntro.message: Start with one locale file if the extension only has one Chrome Web Store language today. Keep media, category, additional fields, and privacy files beside it so the same project can grow into more locales later.

projectReferenceOneLanguage.message: store-listing/chrome-web-store/listing/en.txt is the recommended direct locale listing file and is copied directly into the Chrome Web Store Detailed description field.

localeDescriptionRule.message: store-listing/chrome-web-store/listing/en.txt is the recommended direct locale listing file and is copied verbatim into the Chrome Web Store Detailed description field. The file should contain only the final detailed description body users should see in the store listing.

localeDescriptionWarnings.message: Do not include the extension name, a title, field labels such as Name, Summary, Description, or Detailed Description, Markdown headings, or the short summary. Use .txt for new direct listing files; .md is supported only for existing plain-text files and is not recommended for new direct listing files.

singleDraftReferenceRule.message: StorePilot also accepts docs/chrome-web-store.md for a single English draft. Only in this draft file, StorePilot may look for a Detailed Description or Description section and import that section as English detailed description text. This section parsing does not apply to direct locale listing files such as store-listing/chrome-web-store/listing/en.txt.

listingNonGoalNote.message: These belong in the Chrome Web Store dashboard or in dedicated automation documents, not in locale listing files.

projectReferenceDetectionHint.message: Folder names such as store-listing, chrome-web-store, listing, media, screenshots, promo, assets, store-assets, and icons help StorePilot pick the right files when a project contains extra build output.

categoryDocReferenceIntro.message: StorePilot can scan one project document for the Chrome Web Store category. Use an explicit Selected category line so the scanner does not infer from notes or option lists.

categoryDocSelectedRule.message: Recommended filename: docs/chrome-web-store-category.md. The file should contain Selected category: followed by one visible Chrome Web Store category label.

categoryDocNoUsableFile.message: No usable category document found ($1 candidate(s) scanned).

privacyDocNoUsableFile.message: Не найден пригодный для использования документ о конфиденциальности (кандидаты $1 отсканированы).

privacyDocNoUsableFileShort.message: Не найден пригодный для использования документ о конфиденциальности.

privacyDocNotImported.message: Для активного проекта не импортирован документ о конфиденциальности.

importPrivacyDocInOptions.message: Импортируйте или повторно импортируйте проект с помощью параметров StorePilot, чтобы загрузить документ конфиденциальности.

privacyNoValueForField.message: Нет значения документа о конфиденциальности для $1.

privacyNoSupportedFields.message: Не удалось заполнить поддерживаемые поля конфиденциальности.

privacyActionsOnlyOnPrivacyPage.message: Действия по обеспечению конфиденциальности доступны только на странице «Конфиденциальность».

reimportFolderToScanPrivacyDoc.message: Повторно импортируйте папку проекта, чтобы отсканировать документ конфиденциальности.

reimportFolderToScanCategoryDoc.message: Re-import the project folder to scan the category document.

abortRequestedStopAfterStep.message: Запрос на прерывание. StorePilot остановится после текущего шага панели мониторинга.

dashboardDiagnosticsMissingElements.message: Диагностика информационной панели обнаружила отсутствующие элементы страницы.

folderAccessPrompt.message: StorePilot запросит подтверждение перед чтением выбранной папки проекта. Эта подсказка ожидаема.

folderImportHandledInOptions.message: Импорт папки осуществляется на вкладке параметров, где запрос на подтверждение папки может быть надежно завершен.

folderImportHintFlexible.message: Выберите корень проекта, папку со списком магазинов или папку с прямым списком. StorePilot попросит вас подтвердить доступ к папке.

additionalFieldsDocNoUsableFile.message: No usable additional fields document found ($1 candidate(s) scanned).

additionalFieldsDocNoUsableFileShort.message: No usable additional fields document found.

reimportFolderToScanAdditionalFieldsDoc.message: Re-import the project folder to scan additional fields.

additionalFieldsReferenceIntro.message: StorePilot can scan one project document for Chrome Web Store Additional fields values. Keep these outside locale listing files so the detailed description body stays clean.

additionalFieldsReferenceRule.message: Recommended filename: docs/chrome-web-store-additional-fields.md. Omit a key or leave it blank when StorePilot should not touch that dashboard field. Use none for URL fields only when you want StorePilot to clear/select no URL. For mature_content, use yes to turn the switch on or no to turn it off; none, blank, or omitted means do not touch the switch.

additionalFieldsDocNotImported.message: No additional fields document imported for the active project.

officialUrlFieldNotFound.message: Could not find the Official URL field.

officialUrlOptionNotFound.message: Could not find Official URL option: $1.

additionalFieldDidNotAcceptValue.message: Additional field did not accept value: $1.

additionalFieldsNoSupportedFields.message: No supported additional fields were available to fill.

tabKeyboardNavigationHint.message: Choose which shortcuts switch the options tabs.

showAdvancedFillActionsHint.message: Shows Fill current language in the popup and dashboard panel for debugging or one-off manual fills.

resetLocalDataConfirm.message: Delete all StorePilot local projects, preferences, dashboard bindings, folder permissions, and media file handles from this browser?

resetLocalDataHint.message: Deletes imported projects, preferences, dashboard bindings, folder permissions, and media file handles from this browser.

reimportFolderToScanDataUsage.message: Re-import the project folder to scan data usage disclosures.

privacyDocDataUsageRule.message: For data usage checkboxes, answer the exact Chrome Web Store public disclosure question: what user data do you plan to collect from users now or in the future? Treat collect as data that leaves local-only browser/device processing and is received, uploaded, logged, reviewed, or otherwise made available to the developer, a product backend, analytics, support, or a third-party service. These keys are not permission justifications and are not a list of data the extension can access or store locally. Use yes only for those developer or third-party collection cases. For local-only features where data stays on the user's device, use no; for example, a local history vault can need permission.history while still using data_usage.web_history: no. StorePilot applies explicit yes/no values: yes checks a box, no unchecks it; none, blank, or omitted leaves it unchanged.

dataUsageNoExplicitYes.message: No explicit data usage values were available to apply.

dataUsageCheckboxStructureNotFound.message: Could not confidently map Data usage checkboxes.

privacyDocRemoteCodeRule.message: For remote code, use remote_code as the Chrome Web Store yes/no answer. Use no when all code is packaged locally, and do not include remote_code_justification for that case. Use yes only when the extension uses remote code, and then provide remote_code_justification for the required justification textarea.

localizedScreenshotsNoMatchingFiles.message: No localized screenshot files match imported listing locales.

localizedScreenshotTargetNotFound.message: Localized screenshots upload target not found on this page.

localizedScreenshotExtraFiles.message: Extra localized screenshot file(s) ignored after the first five.

localizedScreenshotSlotMismatch.message: Screenshot filenames differ from the first localized screenshot set.

localizedScreenshotMissingListing.message: Localized screenshot folder has no matching imported listing text.

mediaAlphaNotAllowed.message: PNG alpha channel is not allowed for this CWS asset.
